scenes.description: 一位身穿白色衬衫的男性在明亮简约的室内环境中面对镜头，似乎正在进行讲话或表达观点，背景干净，光线柔和均匀，营造出专注而清新的氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: A young man with dark hair and a white shirt stands centered in a minimalist indoor space, speaking directly to the camera with engaged facial expressions and natural hand gestures. The environment features neutral-toned walls and flooring, creating a clean, professional atmosphere. Soft, even lighting eliminates harsh shadows, enhancing clarity and focus. Shot in 4K resolution at 24fps with a shallow depth of field, the scene uses a slight dolly-in movement to subtly increase intimacy and engagement. The visual style is modern and polished, ideal for educational or conversational content.

style_elements.characters: Young male in white shirt, dark hair, expressive face and hands
style_elements.environment: Minimalist indoor room with neutral tones, smooth walls and floor
style_elements.visual_style: Clean, bright, modern aesthetic with soft lighting

scenes.description: 画面转向两位人物在正式室内空间中互动，一人穿深色衣服，另一人部分入镜，两人似在进行严肃对话，环境体现办公室或会议室风格，色调沉稳，氛围专注。
scenes.video_prompt: Two individuals engage in a quiet, meaningful conversation in a formal indoor setting resembling an office or meeting room. One man wears a dark-colored jacket and faces slightly off-center, while another person appears partially in frame, suggesting proximity and intimacy in dialogue. The environment is characterized by muted tones, straight lines, and organized simplicity, conveying professionalism. Lighting remains evenly diffused with no strong contrasts. Captured in 4K at 24fps with a static medium-wide shot, the camera holds steady to emphasize the seriousness of the exchange. The visual tone is composed and restrained, supporting narrative depth and emotional subtlety.

style_elements.characters: Two adults in formal attire, one fully visible in dark clothing, the other partially framed
style_elements.environment: Formal interior with neutral walls, structured layout, office-like feel
style_elements.visual_style: Muted, professional look with balanced lighting and minimal contrast
